# API Checklist: Estimate Property Value Using Location Only

**Purpose**: Validate API requirements clarity, completeness, and coverage for location-only estimation.
**Created**: 2026-03-10
**Feature**: `/home/ayra/ECE_493/Capstone-Test-Repo/specs/005-uc05-feature-spec/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are request/response schemas fully specified for success, fallback success, normalization failure, and insufficient-data failure cases? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements, Spec §Exception / Error Flows]
- [x] CHK002 Are response fields specified for indicators and warnings (location-only and reduced-accuracy)? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK003 Are input rules (location-only, no extra attributes) explicitly defined for API consumers? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK004 Is range widening rule and comparability requirement clearly expressed for API consumers? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK005 Do API requirements align with UI flow requirements for indicators and warnings? [Consistency, Spec §Functional Requirements, Spec §Non-Functional Requirements]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK006 Are requirements defined for API behavior when normalization fails or data is insufficient? [Coverage, Spec §Exception / Error Flows]
